title: meibomia jaliscana
intro: Meibomia jaliscana, also known as Butterfly Weed, is a perennial plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in the southwestern United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Meibomia jaliscana include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
